title: Import Large SQL Files on Bluehost
description: Bluehost’s phpMyAdmin limits can block big imports. Use this proven workflow.
author: SQLSplit

content.text: Large dumps often exceed Bluehost’s upload and execution limits.
Split the dump into 10–20MB parts and import sequentially.
Related: **How to Import Large SQL Files in cPanel**.

content.title: Import on Bluehost
content.text: Split big SQL files and avoid timeouts.

faq.question: Can support import the dump for me?
